asset_name: HP and Echo Token HUD Sheet

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle slices or sub-rect extraction from one HUD sheet for the heart row and echo-token row.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_hp_and_echo_tokens_sheet_192x32.png through AssetServer and slice separate rects for the top-left HP row and top-right echo token row.
runtime_notes: Heart icons should support three HP states and echo tokens should support two remaining summon charges.
Keep icon silhouettes bold because these widgets sit over a dark but detailed backdrop.
The sheet is a source atlas; on-screen layout is split between left and right anchors.

context.usage: Single HUD source sheet providing the three-heart HP row and the two-token echo counter used at the top corners of gameplay.

shape.silhouette: HUD sheet with three heart slots on the left half and two echo summon tokens on the right half.

acceptance_criteria: All three heart slots and both echo tokens remain distinct when viewed at 1x gameplay scale.
The sheet leaves at least 2 px of padding around every icon group for clean UI slicing.

reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.
